uses: Linochilus glutinosus, commonly known as the sticky-tongued flycatcher, has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In some cultures, the plant is used to treat digestive problems, including diarrhea and nausea.
